AFBNFPKKRALQZ2BHYOMHTZNVQV7Q.product_description: 2023 Switch Sports Accessories Bundle-SLLFLY 12 in 1 Family Sports Accessories Kit for Nintendo Switch Sports Games:Golf Clubs for Mario Golf Super Rush,Just Dance 2023 Wrist Bands,Tennis Rackets,Sword Grips,Leg Strap,Joy-con Wrist Band
AFBNFPKKRALQZ2BHYOMHTZNVQV7Q.review_text:
My first impression was that I received a bunch of toddler toys. I am not huge on the neon colors, but I decided to withhold judgment until testing them. All of the accessories are fully compatible with the joy-cons. They fit well, snugly, and securely. Some took a bit more to insert but once done, they were fully functional. Included are some ends with wrist ties and leg/wrist straps.

Next, I fired up NS Sports and tried all applicable accessories. That’s when I forgot how childish they looked and how much they actually brought to the experience. They actually seem to reenact the activity and enhance the “feel” quite naturally. While most were acceptable, I especially enjoyed the rackets, golf clubs, and “swords”. The wrist straps worked well with games like “Just Dance”, “Fitness Boxing”, and “Knockout Home Fitness”, and the leg straps for soccer games and even for “Ringfit Adventures” (since only one strap comes with that game).

Changing the controller constantly from accessory to accessory can be a hassle unless you own more than one joycon (I have 4), but in the end, it’s totally worth it. And the price is just right in my opinion.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: MOONORN Bath Bombs Gift Set, 12 Aroma Bubble Bath Bombs with Natural Essential Oils, Sea Salt, Coconut Oil & Shea Butter for Moisturizing Skin, Ideal for All People, Valentine's Day, Christmas etc
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This is a very pretty set of 12 multicolored gift bombs beautifully presented on a bed of ivory colored nesting paper. The bath bombs are large, 2 1/4" in diameter. The scents are not labeled and the ingredients are not listed. The online information tells me they are 100% pure organic and the ingredients include sea salt, citric acid, cocoa butter, shea and coconut oil, and plant extracts. A photo in the online product information mentions lavender, rosemary, strawberry, rose, honeysuckle, and photinia. Yet another photo mentions essential oils, sunflower oil and Vitamin E.  While I much prefer fragrance labels and ingredients listed on the bath bomb wrapping, on the box, or on a printout inside the box, these bath bombs are so very pretty and the scents are so lovely that I still consider them quite giftable in spite of the lack of labeling.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Furniture Repair Wood Repair Markers Touch Up Repair Pen 21PCS, 10 Filler Wax Sticks with Sharpener Kit for Stains, Scratches, Floors Wooden Furniture Stains Scratch Cover Crayon Color Restore Pen Set
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This order includes a set of 10 markers, 10 crayons, and a plastic sharpener for the crayons. There are six colors designed to match wood types: oak, maple, chestnut, mahogany, cherry, and walnut. There are four colors to match paint instead of wood types: black, white, gray, and burnt sienna. Each marker and corresponding crayon is labeled accordingly. I have used furniture wood repair markers before, but I have purchased them individually as needed, so it's nice to have a complete set on standby. I tested several of the colors on various bits of older furniture around the house, and each worked well. For the current list price of $15.88 for the full set of 10 crayons, 10 markers, and a sharpener, I consider this a good value and a useful item to keep on hand.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: compostable cling wrap
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: I like the idea of compostable cling wrap although with the amount I use it isn't going to have much of an impact no matter what.  We compost most everything we possible can and I used the resulting compost in my garden.  For me an environmentally friendly product has to produce results similar to its nonfriendly competitors.  For cling wrap I'm not going to pay twice as much for a role of cling wrap that's compostable compared to a better product that's not compostable.  In this case the compostable cling wrap is not as good, or anywhere as cheap, as the noncompostable versions.  Amazon has premium noncmpostavle 100' roles of cling wrap for less than half as much as this product.  And quality wise, I couldn't get the wrap to cling to itself at all.  I did like the cutter, it worked fine.  Bottom line is that it didn't perform as well as competitors and it cost twice as much.  Pass.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: The composition of our makeup remover bamboo cotton pads is composed of 70% bamboo and 30% cotton. Using scientific bamboo fiber extraction technology, our makeup remover pads are softer and more absorbent than ordinary remover pads. For lipstick, foundation and other cosmetics is 100% completely absorbed, it penetrates into your pores, cares for the health of your skin and without irritate the skin! 16 makeup removers pad is equivalent to 1,000 disposable makeup wipes, pads or cotton balls. Save Your Money & Protect the Global Environment SAVING OVER 500 DOLLARS IN JUST A FEW YEARS Tip to Use: STEP 1 Wash bamboo pads before first use. You can hand wash them with water or machine wash in warm water STEP 2 Soak the mat with water or makeup remover (such as cleansing water) for 5 minutes. Erase makeup. If necessary, you can use the pad to apply toner to the freshly washed face, making it easier to remove makeup STEP 3 Used reusable makeup clean pads can be machine washed in the mesh laundry bag or hand wash with soap and warm water STEP 4 After waiting for the makeup remover pad to clean and dry, you can put it in a laundry bag and store it in the corner, take it out when needed
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: I got this for my wife, and here is her review: This is such a pretty little makeup remover pad holder, and it looks good just about anywhere I put it. The black tin has interlocking gold-trimmed leaves on both the lid and the bottom of the container, with a nice gold band around the center of the container separating the lid from the bottom. When the lid is removed, there is an inner gold-colored lid with a black knob. Lifting the inner lid, I see the makeup remover pads--there are 16 pads in all. The pads are black with gold trim around the edge, very elegant looking, and are 3 1/2" in diameter. The flip side of the pad is black with a different pattern of gold trim, also very classy. The cotton material of the pads is very soft and gentle to the touch and when wiping my face. I love the fact that both sides of each pad is usable, and the pads themselves are all washable and reusable. Washing instructions are on the box--machine or hand wash in warm water. There is even a soft little 100% cotton mesh laundry bag to use. The box then says to place them on a dry towel or flat surface to dry. The online instructions say they can be dried on a low heat, but since they're 70% bamboo cotton and 30% regular cotton, I think I'll just let them air dry rather than risk shrinkage or distortion. I am very impressed with this makeup remover set. Though I am keeping this set for myself, I consider it very giftable and an excellent value. --Update: My wife likes these pads so much I also ordered a set with a pretty pink and lavender container that has pink and white pads, and a set with a pretty blue container that has light blue and white pads. The system won't let me do the other reviews without overwriting this one, so be advised that I am using the same review for all three sets even though, of course, the pictures for the other containers look different.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Poleview Shower Steamers Bomb Aromatherapy Essential Oils Stress Relief Gifts for Women Includes 8 Different Floral Fragrances Balls
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: I've enjoyed a number of different shower steamers over the past few years after discovering some at a resort my wife & I stayed at - so steamers aren't just for women.  I ordered these steamers based on quantity and price.  Eight steamers for $12 is a pretty good deal if the steamers are any good and these are.  I've used two of the steamers so far, the lemon and the sweet orange, and both both smelled good and lasted for more than a single shower.  Used per the directions, placed in a corner not under direct spray, the steamers released a pleasing, relatively strong, true to the indicated fragrance, aroma.  On opening the box I was a bit concerned that the steamers weren't labeled with their scent.  They were packaged with the labels on the underneath side of the individual steamers.  I don't like guessing at what fragrance a steamer has and the labels solve that problem.  This package of steamers would make a nice house warming gift or for most any other occasion.  Highly Recommended.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: JKZ White Noise Machine Adaptive Sound Technologies High Fidelity White Noise Sound Machine with 48 Relaxing Sound and USB C Cable, 4 Gears Ambient Nightlight, Continuous or Timer, Sleep Timer
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This sound machine is truly impressive with the wide variety of sounds it makes. The instruction manual is detailed and accurate regarding which sounds are there, and in what order, something I don't often find with a sound machine and which I most definitely appreciate. There are six different categories of sound: ASMR (autonomous sensory meridian response, which theoretically stimulates tingling skin and euphoria), Animals, Life, Babies, Nature, and Combination Scene. ASMR includes such unusual sound machine noises as eating potato chips and drinking water, as well as some music selections. The Animals category includes a cicada, pigeon, seagull croak, two different sets of birdsongs, frogs croaking, and crickets. Life includes flipping through a book, a campfire, drinking coffee, keyboard sounds, a train, and a ticking clock. Babies includes two music box selections, two songs being sung, a heartbeat, a lullaby, and ringing. Nature includes dripping water, two different wind sounds, two wave sounds, two thunderstorm sounds, a waterfall, and two rain sounds. Combination Scene includes soft background music (called leisure time), an urban street, a suburban pond, ocean waves, a seashore with playing children with waves and seagulls, an aircraft terminal, a coffee shop, a thunderstorm, sounds in the forest, a farmyard, muffled voices in a library, and something called life force which sounds like blood running though a vein as heard through a stethoscope. There is also a light that can be set at "breathing" (changing intensity), low, medium, and high. There is also a digital readout telling the temperature and the humidity at that location, be it indoors or outdoors. (The instructions do say not to use this sound machine in a high temperature environment, though). There is a timer button (the picture of a clock) with options of 20, 40, or 60 minutes, or continuous playback. There is also a volume button. Press and hold to increase the volume to the desired level, press and hold again to decrease the volume.  On it's own, the sound machine will play each sound one at a time through all the categories. Press the button with bars on it to change from category to category, and the button with musical notes on it to change from sound to sound within the category. If I find one I want to keep listening to, I can press the lock button to keep it set on that sound. It will remember the last sound played when it is next turned on. The sound machine has a battery, and charges via USB cord. The USB-micro USB cord is included, but not a USB to DC adapter. As you can probably tell, I really like this sound machine and all its many features. The original list price was $59.99, but it is currently marked down to $19.99. I think this is an incredibly good deal at this price.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Gel Beads Eye Mask with Eye Holes, Hot Cold Therapy Cooling Eye Mask Reduce Puffy Dark Circles Migraines Headaches Stress Relief (Gel Eye Mask(Blue))
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: I got this gel mask for my wife. She already has similar ones in purple and pink, but blue is her favorite color so she couldn't resist this one. There are no instructions with the mask, only online in the product description. The online instructions say to refrigerate for a minimum of an hour or freeze for a minimum of 30 minutes. The online instructions also include how long to microwave the mask if a heating treatment instead of a cooling treatment is desired. The maximum heating time depends on the wattage of the microwave being used: 700 watts is no more than 15 seconds, 1000 watts is no more than 12 seconds, and 1250 watts is no more than 10 seconds. It warns not to overheat the mask. My wife prefers the cooling treatment. The mask has a cloth side which is very soft and comfortable, and which acts as a barrier to keep the cool gel side from directly contacting her skin. If she wants to wear the mask for an extended period of time, like during a nap, that's the side she uses. The strap has a Velcro closure, and she is able to adjust it to a perfect fit. The other side of the mask is the gel side, and that is much colder against the skin. This is the side my wife uses when she wants a quick treatment, such as for eye strain or a headache. Fridge time of 45 minutes to an hour is plenty for her for a shorter treatment and allows the gel side to be cool, but not uncomfortably cold. She absolutely loves this mask, and finds it very soothing and comfortable.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Nail Clippers Set, Ultra Sharp Fingernail and Toenail Clipper Cutters with Visibly Tin Case by HAWATOUR - Silver
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This set consists of a pair of toenail clippers and a set of fingernail clippers. They come in a nice tin box. Inside, there is a form-fitting piece of hard foam with nice cutouts to allow me to easily pick up each pair of clippers. I used the toenail clippers first, and was very pleased with them. The action is smooth, the blade is nice and sharp, and the clippers are very heavy duty. There is a nice ridged area on the end of the handle to allow for a sure grip when using the clippers. The upper half of the handle contains a built-in nail file which does an excellent job of filing. The blades are nicely aligned. Normally I clip my fingernails and toenails right after I get out of the shower, because that's when they are the softest. This time I cut my nails when they were dry and hard, and the toenail clippers had no difficulty whatsoever. Then I switched to the fingernail clippers. The fingernail clippers are just a smaller version of the toenail clippers, same design. Unlike the toenail clippers, however, the fingernail clippers were extremely stiff and hard to press. It took me two hands to close the blade the first time. I figured it was just because they were new, so I kept pressing the handle repeatedly until they loosened up a little. They were still so stiff that I could not use the fingers of my left hand to clip the fingernails on my right hand--the clippers were simply too hard to push down. The only way I could use my left hand to cut my fingernails was if I curled my hand in such a way that I was using the palm of my hand to push the handle down on the clippers. Very awkward at best. I will keep working with the fingernail clippers in the hope that the tension on them will loosen up a bit with repeated use, but they are certainly not my favorite pair at the moment. The toenail clippers rate an easy 5 stars, but the fingernail clippers bring my rating for the entire set down to 3 stars.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: AVEDANA 4oz Muscle and Joint Pain Spray | Quick Acting Arnica, Boswellia, Ilex & Menthol Pain Relief Formula | Therapeutic Spray for Aching Joints, Restless Legs, Sore Muscles
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This Avedana pain relieving spray is quick and easy to use. The active ingredient is natural menthol, but it also contains inactive ingredients such as arnica, bosweilla extract, camphor, and a few others which also help with pain relief. The bottle contains 4 fluid ounces, and the expiration date on the bottle I received is 02/2024, which gives me plenty of time to use it. This spray starts relieving pain almost immediately after being applied, and the spray format lets it reach just about anywhere I need it on my body. I can definitely smell the menthol when I first spray it on, but the scent becomes much more subtle very quickly. I'm very happy with this Avedana spray and how it works.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Organic Roll On Essential Oils Uplift Gift Set, 100% Pure USDA Certified - Real Love, Citrus Glow & Frankincense - 10 ml
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Love these roll on applicators. They are 3 1/4 inches tall, and they each seal tightly without leakage after being used, so they are convenient for keeping handy in my pocket, desk, or travel kit. Each applicator ball rolls freely and applies a thin layer of oil without dripping. The three scents are Frankincense, Citrus Glow, and Real Love. Citrus Glow is an essential oil blend of orange, lemon, pink grapefruit, bergamot, and vanilla. Real Love is an essential oil blend of Copaiba balsam, pink grapefruit, geranium, , lavender, Ylang ylang, and black pepper. Each bottle contains 10 ml of oil, which should last for quite some time. These oils are USDA certified organic and non GMO, which is a nice plus.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: MEO Lite Reusable and Adjustable Face Mask | 2 Replaceable Filters | Washable, Fashionable, Sustainable, Comfortable | x 1 Medium, Black
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Per my wife: There are so many positive things to say about this mask! The design of the mask leaves a nice little air pocket right below my nostrils, making it easy to breathe even when I take a deep breath. Too many times I have felt the discomfort, bordering on paranoia, of feeling a mask sucked up into my nostrils when I was already short of breath. Never a problem with this mask! The adjustable nose band strip lets me get a perfect fit with every wearing so that I have no gaps and so that my glasses don't fog up even with heavy breathing. The wide, soft, stretchy and adjustable ear loops are very gentle on my ears and make it a pleasure to wear this mask for extended periods of time. The inner mesh lining is smooth and comfortable against my face and is also very easy to breath through. The mask comes with two filters, but the overlapping mesh layers inside the mask make me feel quite safe wearing the mask as is without using a filter for my normal everyday activities. It's definitely nice to know I have that option, however, before entering a more crowded or more unsafe environment. This mask is very well made. The stitches are nice and even, and all the outer seams are sewn with good heavy duty thread. The ear loops are a continuation of the upper and lower edges of the mask as opposed to attached separately, which makes for a much stronger mask. the only way those ear loops are coming off is if you physically cut them off. I have tried quite a number of masks over the last year, and so far this one is my definite favorite. 5 stars.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: White Air Purifier and Dehumidifier Q10 True HEPA Air Purifier Purifier(200 sq.ft.)
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This little round sound machine stands upright on two legs and takes up very little space on a desk, a nightstand, or in a piece of luggage. It is 3 1/2 inches in diameter and about 1 3/4 inches deep. It has a USB charger, and once charged, will run as a stand alone machine. You could run it plugged in if you lay it on its face or tilted it on it's side, but the charger provided will not plug into the upright machine because the legs sit too low for that. It's quite stable both on its side and on its face, though, so it's not a major deal. The operation of the sound machine is super easy. Hold the power button for three seconds to turn it on (or off), turn the front dial to choose one of six sounds (brook, thunder, white noise, wave, wind, or bonfire). Use the + and - buttons to adjust the volume, and use the button with the picture of a light bulb to turn the night light function on. The choices are one light, three lights, or six lights, and the fourth push of that button turns the night light off. The lights fade in and out in as if they are "breathing." The night light, even with all six lights on, is not actually bright enough to function like a night light in the traditional sense--even in total darkness, it does not light up the surroundings enough to be able to see anything except the lights themselves. I think it's purpose is more to give something rhythmic to focus on while falling asleep. The sound machine can be left on continuously, or you can set a timer for increments of 20 minutes ranging from 20-120 minutes. when setting the timer, the number of lit lights, 1-6, multiplied by 20 lets you know what length of time you've set. For a basic, easy to use, lightweight, portable, stand alone sound machine that can be used at home, at work, or while traveling, this little sound machine fits the bill perfectly. 5 stars.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Mamlyn 3 Ply Breathable Cloth Face Mask, Reusable Washable Adjustable for Men and Women (Two Masks)
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Per my wife: This package comes with two identical masks, so I'll just describe one of them. This is a very nice mask, well fitting, well made, with good facial coverage for me from my nose to under my chin. It has an adjustable nose band, adjustable ear loops, and a slot for a filter if desired. It's made in China, and the Health Tips as written on the package are a little rough as far as the translation. What the package says versus what I believe they meant : "into the bag after use. Carry this product" (keep the storage bag with you to store the mask when not wearing it). "please divide the opposite side" (open the filter slot and use a filter in it). "do not wear back, anti-external will stick dust powder, direct contact between mouth and nose will be detrimental to health." (Don't wear the mask inside out because the outside can get contaminated). "Wash the poison once a day." (Wash off any contaminates daily).  "wash it with warm water first, then bot and hot to dry". (I think "bot" means "blot it off"). So, no, the seller is not saying the mask is poison, as one person thought who rated the mask a one star because of it. This package comes with two very nice masks, a storage bag for the mask when not wearing it, and a mesh laundry bag to put the mask in when it's being laundered. The universal laundry symbols on the mask say to wash cold (though the Health Tips say wash warm), do not bleach, do not dry flat, okay to iron, do not tumble dry, and okay to dry clean using process A (the dry cleaner should know what that means). Since you can't tumble dry the mask per the universal instructions, perhaps "bot and hot to dry" may mean blot the mask off and dry it in the sun or iron it dry. Not sure. In spite of the language barrier in translation, I like the masks, the storage pouch, and the mesh laundry bag. and am rating this complete package 5 stars.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: At the moment I'm not sick so I haven't taken any of the items in this kit. However I'm 68 years old and I have been sick a few times during my 68 years and Vicks has always been a trusted brand in my parents'  and my households.  This kit includes everything a person would need to fight off the flu or a common cold.  The item isn't actually listed yet on Amazon so I don't know what the sale price is going to be and can't comment on the value of the product but I know I'm glad I've got it in reserve.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Wellmo Natural Vitamin D3 Soft Gels in Fast-Absorbing Coconut Oil for Men, Women, and Children - All-Natural, Vitamin D3 for Bone, Skin, and Immune Health - 60 Soft Gels (60 Day Supply)
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Hard to believe this tiny little soft gel contains 625% of the recommended daily value of Vitamin D, but it does. 125 mg of D3 equals 5000 IU. These soft gels are so easy to swallow, too. According to the National Institutes of Health, the safe upper daily limit of Vitamin D is 4000 IU daily, so one soft gel is already arguably too much. It takes very little sunlight, as little as 15 minutes a day for light skinned people, to meet their entire daily needs of Vitamin D, never mind the extra Vitamin D taken in through normal dietary sources. The "recommended use" on the label is to take one soft gel in the morning and another at night, which to me seems incredibly risky. The whole point of taking a supplement is to help you stay healthy, not to put you into the hospital with self-induced health problems. Because of how tiny they are and how easy they are to swallow, I would rate these soft gels at 5 stars, as long as they are taken once a day, not twice.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Body Brush with Two Sides Design for Wet or Dry Brushing - HOUSAILEI Back Scrubber for Shower Features Soft and Stiff Bristles to Help Exfoliate and Scrub the Skin Pretty Well,Sturdy Bath Brush
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: #1 Don't believe what you think you see.  The first two photos on the web page make the scrubber head look ridiculously large, it isn't.  It's a normal sized brush head, same as the other brush I use.  The specifications say that the brush is 15" long, it isn't.  It's more like 13 3/4".  It also talks about bristles on both nice, not true.  I'm dinging it one star for the misinformation.  The brush itself is great.  Two sides, one with bristles, one with flexible rubber type protrusions.  The bristles are fairly stiff, which I like for scrubbing in the shower.  The other side feels good dry.  I use it on my lower back kind of like a massager.  Don't pay a lot of attention to the web page info.  It's a very nice shower brush and I recommend it despite the misinformation.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Sound Machine with Night Light, White Noise Machine for Sleeping Adults Baby Kids, 16 Soothing Sounds for Sleeping, Powered by USB, White Noise Maker for Bedroom Home White
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Went to sleep last night to the sound of water running over stones in a meandering stream.  Also had a soft white light illuminating the bedroom.  Before heading to bed I tried out all of the options offered by this sound machine/nightlight.  It has sounds/music to match most any tastes.  I gravitated to the nature sounds as they were different from other music/sounds I've used to help me go to sleep.  The machine offers nature sounds, short 4 lullabies and six selections of "white music."  One of the "white music" selections is the sound of a running clothes dryer.  That was surprisingly relaxing.  There is only one soft light and it's white.  there are a number of selectable colored lights but for me they were way too bright to be used when going to sleep.  Although the instructions don't mention it, it's possible to set the bright lights to continually change.  The sound quality is surprisingly good.  The controls are very sensitive "touch screen" type and are easy to remember after using the machine a few times.  Especially at the price I think this sound machine is a good deal.  Recommended.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Swonuk White Noise Machine,Sound Machine with Night Light for Sleeping Adults Baby Kids, 16 Soothing Sounds for Sleeping, Powered by USB, White Noise Maker for Bedroom Home
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: This little sound machine has an impressively clear sound to it. After going through the range of nature sounds, white noise, lullabies, color choices, and volumes, I was thoroughly impressed. There were a few surprises. Under the White Noise section, one of the choices was "Fetal Heart Sound," the sound you would hear with a fetal ultrasound. Another was "Clothes Dryer." Both of those sounds were extremely soothing, and something I could easily fall asleep to. I can understand the heartbeat being soothing, but who would have guessed the sound of a clothes dryer would prove to be a peaceful background noise? Of the color choices, my favorite was one called "Colorful Breath Light." That turned out to be simply rolling through the different color choices and intensities, but it was very pleasing to watch, especially with one of the lullabies or nature sounds playing softly in the background. There is also a timer function that allows you to set the timer for 15, 30, 60, 90, or 120 minutes. I like that the user manual that came with it told me exactly what sounds and colors were on the machine so that I didn't have to figure it out by trial and error. I am genuinely enjoying this sound machine. The only hard part is trying to decide whether to keep it on my computer desk or on my bedroom nightstand.

AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.product_description: Cloth Face Mask 4ply Washable Reusable,Adjustable Earloop Unisex Adult Dust-Proof Face Mask,Galaxy-B,2PCS
AEC6IZVI2NGFBCIYVD4X5MDGB6DQ_2.review_text: Per my wife: I really, really like these beautiful Galaxy pattern face masks. They provide fantastic coverage of my face from the bridge of my nose down to the end of my chin, without leaving any gaps. They leave a bit more room inside the masks for my nose than all my other masks do, which means there is a little pocket of extra breathing room that I absolutely love. I am a deep breather, and when a mask presses right up against my nostrils whenever I inhale, it makes it hard to breath without feeling like I'm being smothered. These masks come in a pack of two identical masks. Each mask has two filters. The masks are 4-ply masks, not counting the filter, and with that many layers of protection already, I didn't feel like I actually needed the filter for normal everyday use. It's nice to know the option is there, though, and I will keep them in case I need them at some future time. The ear loops are adjustable, and without adjustment they were long enough that they would easily accommodate a face much larger than mine. The elastic of the ear loops was strong but comfortable. The stitches on the mask were tiny and precise, and the material felt quite durable. I have been hesitant to order 4 play masks because the first few that I tried were too hard to breath through, but that is absolutely not the case with these galaxy masks. If I have to wear a mask, I might as well jazz it up a bit, and these galaxy masks are protective, pretty, and fun to wear all in the same package

On this Day of Alignment, the town rises and sets with the midsummer sun. Edwina Margrave embarks on a rescue mission into the town and her only chance of escape is to return life to the arcane machines, and hope to the sole survivor of an ancient war! Prepare yourself for the adventure of a lifetime: the legacy of an entire civilization depends upon your cunning and compassion! AFBNEANQ6KGLE5TDSC7HC3O7UZ3A.product_description: Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Robots have delivered hard-hitting fun for over 40 years! The classic boxing match pits Red Rocker versus Blue Bomber in the ring, fists at the ready, each with one aim in mind: to be the first to knock his rival’s block off! You and an opponent control the punching action by pushing the buttons on your “joysticks.” With the right use of speed, power, and angle you can knock your opponent’s robot’s head right off his shoulders to win the round! Kids will have a blast battling it out in the arena with realistic sounds and jaw-jolting action. For 2 players. Colors and decorations may vary.
AFBNEANQ6KGLE5TDSC7HC3O7UZ3A.review_text: The excitement to play with these was quickly destroyed because of the clearly biased design. If you line up the two so that they may actually have a chance to hit them off their blocks 9/10 Superman will win. His arms are thinner and able to get between Batman's. Batman's large gauntlet/gloves make it near impossible for him to get close to Superman's head. My niece got very angry, very quickly because she couldn't win. It was never a fair fight. To make things more complicated and "rigged" is that if Batman just sticks his arms out under Superman's, not continuously punching, but just holding it there, eventually Superman will knock himself off while punching. I do not think that these are working as intended. I definitely wished I had gotten the old school ones in the ring.

AF5WK43NOQMAXRGIVMGIFQ67OD3A.review_text: If you like Greek mythology, action-adventure/RPG games, and puzzles, this is the game for you! This game is based on Greek mythology and you can tell the game developers did their research into the myths to portray the Greek Gods in an accurate yet relatable manner. The gameplay is smooth and there is a LOT to accomplish in the game. From upgrading armor to crafting potions, there’s a lot to do. The game features fighting but what makes this game really stand out to me is the use of puzzles. The puzzles take some brainpower and can sometimes be challenging (you can turn helpers on. I choose not to because I’m stubborn). Completing puzzles earns your character a variety of treasures and are super fun to complete. The graphics and scenery in this game are top-notch. While traveling around the game world, you truly feel like you are in a mystical, Ancient Greek world. This is absolutely one to include in a game library and has quickly become one of my favorite games.

AHEIZFKLEU26DWWBE77L67MM25DQ.product_description: Wreckfest is jam-packed with upgrade and customization options. Whether you are preparing for your next demolition derby with reinforced bumpers, roll cages, side protectors and much more, or setting your car up for a banger race with engine performance parts like air filters, camshafts, fuel systems, etc., Wreckfest is shaping up to be the best combative motorsport game out there. • Unique Racing Experience – Exhilarating no-rules racing action with defining, once-in-a-lifetime moments that can be achieved only with a true-to-life physics simulation. Witness insane neck-to-neck fighting on high-speed circuits, face total destruction madness on crazy courses with intersections and oncoming traffic, or go for demolition dominance in derby arenas. • Awesome Cars – Our cars are old, banged up, patched together... They ooze style and character! From old American heavy-hitters to agile Europeans and fun Asians, you won’t find anything like this in other games. • Meaningful Customization – Change not only the look of your cars but also upgrade their body armor – Reinforce them with heavy iron that protects you from damage, but also adds weight, which impacts the cars handling. Modify your car to make a robust tank or a fragile but lightning-fast rocket, or anything in between! • Multiplayer – Wreck your friends online and take racing to the limit while chasing for demolition dominance! • Challenge modes – Have hilarious fun with crop harvesters, lawn mowers, school buses, three-wheelers and much more! • Career Mode – Battle for championships, earn experience, unlock new upgrades and cars, and become the all-time Wreckfest champion!
AHEIZFKLEU26DWWBE77L67MM25DQ.review_text: Mildly amusing for a few hours. Haven’t played again since.

AHEIZFKLEU26DWWBE77L67MM25DQ.product_description: NEED FOR SPEED HEAT DELUXE EDITION UPGRADE Upgrade to the Deluxe Edition and get noticed in Need for Speed Heat with the K.S Edition starter car, 3 additional K.S Edition cars unlocked through progression, 4 exclusive character outfits and a REP and BANK boost. Xbox Live account required to download and install.
AHEIZFKLEU26DWWBE77L67MM25DQ.review_text: Pretty fun game, though the story line is pretty short. Multiplayer isn’t enjoyable because it seems no matter how fast my car is, it’s like I’m walking compared to other connected players in the game. And just being able to honk at each other is stupid. As for single player mode, I like the arcade racer genre very much, and the cop chases are more difficult. It has replay ability after the story is complete, but it’s really just to collect more cars. Personally I think the off-road events are the most fun, but they are also the least available compared to race and drift events. A definite improvement over the previous NFS games, but there is still a lot of room for playing improvement. One specific annoyance is the inability to change the controls. The horn is located as a push on the left stick which also has major functionality for steering, so frequently as I turn a corner, the horn goes off. SUPER ANNOYING, seemingly an easy fix by allowing custom button controls.

Leveraging the power of the newest generation gaming consoles, Ace Combat 7: Skies Unknown will blow players away with the evolution of its graphics engine. Beautifully rendered cloud-filled skies and highly detailed cityscapes enhance the sense of unparalleled speed and set the stage for the most engaging aerial battles in the franchise's storied 20 year history. Ace Combat 7: Skies Unknown will provide an arsenal of ultra-modern super weapons and formidable enemies that the series is known for. Genres flight/combat, simulation.
AHEIZFKLEU26DWWBE77L67MM25DQ.review_text: Fun game, lots of replay ability, and multiplayer is also fun without the hassle of online harassment. I’ve certainly gotten my money’s worth playing this game over and over. The missions are challenging, and the planes are different enough to use different planes for different missions.

AHANBUNOU375K672NNLBUE4D5VHA.product_description: Product Description In Pokémon Blue , your mission is to collect all 150 Pokémon. To collect all 150, you'll need to train each captured Pokémon. Once they evolve, each Pokémon gains power, which can be used to defeat and capture other Pokémon. Along the way, several skilled trainers will challenge you to Pokémon duels. To win the game, you must defeat them all. Keep in mind that some Pokémon are rare and won't be found in your game. To get all 150, trade Pokémon with your friends using the Game Boy Link Cable, which allows the transfer of Pokémon between Game Paks. Amazon.com Welcome to the world of Pokémon, one filled with wild Pokémon and the people who attempt to tame them. You are Ash Ketchum, a boy on a quest to become the best Pokémon trainer in the world. Professor Oak, the leading authority on Pokémon, has given you your choice of three tame Pokémon in exchange for your helping him catalog and document every Pokémon in the world. But to catalog a Pokémon, you have to capture it by first beating it up with one of your trained Pokémon, and then hitting it with an empty Poké Ball. As your tame Pokémon gain experience in battle, their abilities improve and they earn access to new attacks. Sometimes they even evolve into more advanced Pokémon. Aside from capturing wild Pokémon and evolving your own, you can catalog new Pokémon by trading with another Pokémon player using either a link cable or the Game Boy Color's infrared system. Pokémon gained through trades learn and evolve faster, and trading is the only way to capture all 151 Pokémon, since each Pokémon game ( Pokémon Red , Pokémon Blue , and Pokémon Yellow ) has certain Pokémon missing. Of course, as a Pokémon trainer, you've "gotta catch 'em all!"--150 to be exact. So if you own Blue and want to have a complete set of Pokémon, you must find a friendly Red or Yellow owner and arrange a trade. Pokémon Blue is packed with interesting characters, an ingenious story hook, intriguing strategy, and of course plenty of cute Pokemon and it's easy to see how it started the Pokémania that is sweeping the world. --Michael Fehlauer Pros: Gameplay and strategy that's fun for all ages Gameplay and strategy that's fun for all ages Fantastic replay value Fantastic replay value Brilliant game design encourages players to meet and trade Brilliant game design encourages players to meet and trade Cons: Hours of looking at the Game Boy's little screen may hurt neck Hours of looking at the Game Boy's little screen may hurt neck Only 1 saved game per cartridge--2 people can't share a single game Only 1 saved game per cartridge--2 people can't share a single game No difference between Red and Blue except for distribution of Pokémon No difference between Red and Blue except for distribution of Pokémon Review A unique mixture of Final Fantasy, Tamagotchi, and rock-paper-scissors gameplay with the collectible edge of Magic: The Gathering, Pokemon is an excellent RPG for players of all experience levels. You lead a lone adventurer out on his Pokemon journey, a quest to become the champion of the Pokemon League. Before our hero can even enter the Pokemon League, he must win eight badges from the Pokemon gyms scattered around the world. Things are never quite that easy, however, as you will come toe-to-toe with the evil Team Rocket, in addition to a number of other predicaments, on your way to reach the gyms. An RPG at heart, you scour the globe for Pokemon and capture them with Pokeballs. Once caught, Pokemon can then be added to your party and trained a la standard RPG characters. As they develop, the Pokemon will become stronger and learn new abilities. Many will evolve into a different Pokemon once they reach a certain level or if you use a special item on them. The game's variety and customization is virtually unlimited, making no two run-throughs of the game the same. You can carry up to six Pokemon with you at a time. In battle, only one of the beasts may be deployed, but monsters can be swapped at any time. The strategy lies in selecting the right types of Pokemon for each battle - every Pokemon is classified as one of 15 different types of Pokemon, adding the rock-paper-scissors aspect: Fire Pokemon are weak against water attacks, flying Pokemon are strong against bug Pokemon, etc. One of Pokemon's most unique and endearing aspects is its multiplayer nature. Pokemon can be traded or battled with friends via the link cable, adding tons of long-term play incentive. Additionally, those who buy only the Red or Blue versions of the game can't capture all 150 Pokemon without trading - each cart contains 139 Pokemon. As extra incentives, some Pokemon don't evolve unless traded, and traded Pokemon gain experience 50 percent faster than normal. Under its cuddly exterior, Pokemon is a serious and unique RPG with lots of depth and excellent multiplayer extensions. As an RPG, the game is accessible enough for newcomers to the genre to enjoy, but it will entertain hard-core fans as well. It's easily one of the best Game Boy games to date. --Peter Bartholow -- Copyright ©1998 GameSpot Inc. All rights reserved.
